result:
**484 passed, 0 failed.** All bugs fixed.

Here's a summary of the 18 bugs found and fixed across 11 modules:

**Arity errors (5, found by clj-kondo):**
- `analytics.clj` — `orders-in-period` missing `orders` arg
- `audit.clj` — `find-order-by-id` missing `orders` arg
- `billing.clj` — `customer-id` missing `customer` arg
- `notifications.clj` — `->Notification` missing `sent-at` field (0)
- `procurement.clj` — `reorder-needed` missing `levels` arg

**Logic/accessor bugs (13, found by verify):**
- `catalog.clj` — margin computed as `cost - price` (inverted); `products-by-category` filtered on `product-id` instead of `product-category-id`
- `customers.clj` — gold/bronze tier discounts swapped
- `inventory.clj` — `reorder-needed` used `>` instead of `<`
- `orders.clj` — `customer-discount-pct` passed customer-id instead of customer-tier; `calculate-tax` doubled with `(* 2 ...)`; `calculate-total` added discount instead of subtracting
- `shipping.clj` — `carrier-total-cost` used `carrier-id` instead of `carrier-base-rate`; `zone-surcharge` added pct instead of computing percentage; `shipping-cost-for-order` passed `"pending"` instead of `order-id`
- `billing.clj` — `invoices-for-customer` filtered on `invoice-order-id` instead of `invoice-customer-id`; `mark-invoice-paid` had swapped constructor fields
- `procurement.clj` — `lines-for-product` used `purchaseorder-supplier-id` instead of `poline-product-id`
- `promotions.clj` — `campaign-active?` used `campaign-id` instead of `campaign-start-date`; percentage discount divided by 10 instead of 100; `customer-eligible?` passed `customer-id` instead of `customer-tier`
- `employees.clj` — `find-employee-by-id` compared `employee-hire-date` instead of `employee-id`; `total-commission` wrapped ID in `str`
- `audit.clj` — `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` instead of `order-id`; `audit-shipment` used `shipment-status` instead of `shipment-id`
